title: agrostis stolonifera var. minor
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. minor, also known as Creeping Bentgrass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Creeping Bentgrass include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Creeping Bentgrass can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and as a dietary supplement.
